title: Set hardcoded admin principal ID in backend

requirements.text: Set the principal ID '25vbj-lny5e-uxjij-gyv6b-tshsm-glbla-mta6g-knjdg-7lo2f-hztzh-pae' as a hardcoded or seeded admin in the backend access control system so that this principal is recognized as an admin when the application checks for admin privileges.
acceptanceCriteria: The principal '25vbj-lny5e-uxjij-gyv6b-tshsm-glbla-mta6g-knjdg-7lo2f-hztzh-pae' is recognized as an admin by the backend isAdmin or equivalent check.
Existing admin check logic and other admin principals (if any) are not broken by this change.
No other backend functionality is altered.

constraints: Do not remove or break any existing admin principals or access control logic.
Keep all Motoko logic in backend/main.mo (single-actor architecture).
nonGoals: Adding a UI for managing admin principals.
Changing any frontend components or pages.
Modifying fee payment or other unrelated backend features.
